params.SpellDescription: Add X mana of any one color, where X is the number of soul counters on CARDNAME. Spend this mana only to cast instant, sorcery, Demon, and Spirit spells.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add X mana of any one color, where X is the number of soul counters on CARDNAME. Spend this mana only to cast instant, sorcery, Demon, and Spirit spells.

params.TriggerDescription: Morbid — At the beginning of each end step, if a creature died this turn, put a soul counter on CARDNAME.
